creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Sat Nov  9 21:47:01 2013
New Revision: 333348
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/333348

Log:
  - Update to 2.2
  - Add LICENSE
  - Sort PLIST
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  - While I'm here:
    - Remove leading indefinite article from COMMENT
    - Fix *_DEPENDS
    - Support STAGEDIR
  
  Changes:	https://github.com/repoze/repoze.who/blob/master/CHANGES.rst
  PR:		ports/183809
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/devel/py-repoze.who/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/py-repoze.who/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/py-repoze.who/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/devel/py-repoze.who/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/py-repoze.who/Makefile	Sat Nov  9 21:46:56 2013	(r333347)
+++ head/devel/py-repoze.who/Makefile	Sat Nov  9 21:47:01 2013	(r333348)
@@ -2,20 +2,21 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	repoze.who
-PORTVERSION=	2.0
+PORTVERSION=	2.2
 CATEGORIES=	devel python
 MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
-COMMENT=	An identification and authentication framework for WSGI
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
+COMMENT=	Identification and authentication framework for WSGI
 
-BUILD_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}Paste>=1.7.2:${PORTSDIR}/www/py-paste \
+LICENSE=	BSD
+
+BUILD_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}webob>=0:${PORTSDIR}/www/py-webob \
 		${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}zope.interface>=3.5.2:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-zope.interface
 RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
 
 USE_PYTHON=	yes
-USE_PYDISTUTILS=	easy_install
+USE_PYDISTUTILS=easy_install
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 .include <bsd.port.mk>
